inputs.pycode:
import subprocess
p1 = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "lpminer"], capture_output=True, text=True)
p2 = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True, text=True)
lp = p1.stdout.strip()[:120] if p1.stdout.strip() else ""
al = p2.stdout.strip()[:120] if p2.stdout.strip() else ""
result = f"LP: {lp} | ALPHA: {al}" if (lp or al) else "NONE"
result
